_description: Open with a contradictory statement. 'They built walls. Then they took them apart.' High retention on first 15s — viewer's brain locks on resolving the contradiction.

structure.beat: First sentence of contradiction (≤6 words). Bold image.
Second sentence resolving setup with twist (≤8 words).
Pause for 1.5s on key image. Single bass hit on cut.

style_notes: Best for stories where the contradiction IS the iconic detail. Avoid forcing — if no real contradiction in source material, this falls flat.
